title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Momonosuke, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Zunesha as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Back then... I couldn't even protect my LORD, Oden-sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, momonsuke-sam and the rest of his family almost burned in his castle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Despite my minjustsu, I was unable to protect any of them! I can never make up for that failure...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I will never... let myself be that helpless again!! Never!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will not allow the new who bravely joined our raid...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: To die to a mere fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry for the deep everyone!! Prepare to be doused with an unbelievable supply of water!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What an insane amount of water!! May I take some?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Another dead end!! We're done for!! BB-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like hell!! After that battle, I won't let us lose to a lousy fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who started all these flames anyway?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: May the water of ZOU Rescue Our Comraves!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: C'mon, THIS is the least you can let us do for you, killer-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OW, HOT!! WHAT DO WE DO?! THERE'S NOWHERE LEFT TO GO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Huh? Why is everything quaking suddenly...?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
